subject: IBAS Alert n. 4169: not a GRB
body:
S.Mereghetti (IASF-Milano) and N.Mowlavi, M. Beck (ISDC, Versoix) on 
behalf of the IBAS Localization Team report:

IBAS Alert n. 4169 is not due to a GRB.  It has been caused by a known 
source. The attitude information was incorrect at the time of the trigger
